nasb.text: Pharaoh’s servants said to him, “How long will this man be a snare to us? Let the men go, that they may serve the Lord their God. Do you not realize that Egypt is destroyed?”

esv.text: Then Pharaoh’s servants said to him, “How long shall this man be a snare to us? Let the men go, that they may serve the Lord their God. Do you not yet understand that Egypt is ruined?”

cnv.text: 法老的臣僕對法老說：“這人成為我們的網羅要到幾時呢？讓這些人離開吧，使他們可以事奉耶和華他們的　神；埃及已經毀滅了，你還不知道嗎？”

ccb.text: 臣仆对法老说：“这个人还要给我们添多少麻烦呢？让他们离开去事奉他们的上帝耶和华吧！埃及已经快崩溃了，你不知道吗？”
